steps.title: Count the gaps
steps.content:
The wall length is $4x$ feet, and each gap is $\frac{4}{7}$ feet. The number of gaps is
$$\frac{4x}{\frac{4}{7}}=4x\cdot\frac{7}{4}=7x$$

steps.title: Add the endpoint clip
steps.content:
If there are $7x$ gaps between clips, there is one more clip than gap because the first clip is already at the left edge.
$$y=7x+1$$
The answer is D.
